taxonomy_v3: Marketing, Growth Marketing, Growth Marketing Manager
core_skills: SQL, Google Analytics, Mode, Tableau, Looker
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Google Analytics:1.0, Mode:0.0, Tableau:0.5, Looker:0.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of experience in data analytics, preferably in a fast-paced environment, Strong SQL skills for data extraction and analysis, Hands-on experience with analytics and visualization tools such as Google Analytics, Mode, Tableau, Looker, or similar platforms, Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and/or Google Sheets, Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver high-quality work under tight deadlines, Strong communication skills with ability to present complex data insights to non-technical audiences, Detail-oriented approach with commitment to data accuracy and quality, Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively across teams and learn quickly, Passion for digital media and commerce
preferred_quals: Familiarity with Python or R is a plus, Understanding of affiliate marketing and/or e-commerce business models is a plus
core_responsibilities: Prepare and present weekly and/or bi-weekly performance reporting for our portfolio of Commerce brands, highlighting key trends, anomalies, and providing data-driven recommendations to optimize performance, Conduct ad-hoc analyses to support strategic decision-making around revenue growth, traffic optimization, content performance, and partnership opportunities, Develop deep expertise in commerce metrics including affiliate revenue, click-through rates, conversion performance, and audience engagement patterns, Create custom reports and dashboards to address specific business questions and support ongoing initiatives, Serve as a data resource for commerce teams, helping stakeholders understand data sources, interpret results, identify limitations, and frame analytical questions effectively, Work closely with internal data engineering and business intelligence teams to troubleshoot data issues, improve data pipelines, and ensure reporting accuracy, Collaborate with third party data providers (affiliate networks, analytics platforms) to resolve discrepancies, validate data integrity, and optimize data collection, Document data definitions, methodologies, and reporting processes to ensure consistency and knowledge sharing across the team, Identify opportunities to streamline reporting workflows and improve data accessibility for stakeholders, Translate business questions into analytical frameworks and provide recommendations based on findings
job_summary: Condé Nast is a global media company producing high-quality content for over 1 billion consumers. They are seeking an Analyst for Commerce Analytics to provide actionable insights and support the growth of the Commerce team by responding to data requests and conducting analyses.
